# wellplayed Provider

Interact with the [WellPlayed](https://well-played.gg/) GraphQL API. Authenticate either with the application flow (`client_id` + `client_secret`, exchanged for a service token) or by supplying a pre-obtained OIDC access `token`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "wellplayed" {
  organization_id = "my-org" # or WELLPLAYED_ORGANIZATION_ID

  # Application flow (recommended for CI / automation):
  client_id     = var.wellplayed_client_id     # or WELLPLAYED_CLIENT_ID
  client_secret = var.wellplayed_client_secret # or WELLPLAYED_CLIENT_SECRET

  # Static token flow (alternative): supply a pre-obtained OIDC access token.
  # token = var.wellplayed_token # or WELLPLAYED_TOKEN
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `client_id` (String) OAuth2 client id for the application flow. Requires `client_secret`. May also be set with the `WELLPLAYED_CLIENT_ID` environment variable.
- `client_secret` (String, Sensitive) OAuth2 client secret for the application flow. Requires `client_id`. May also be set with the `WELLPLAYED_CLIENT_SECRET` environment variable.
- `endpoint` (String) WellPlayed GraphQL endpoint. Defaults to `https://api.warrior.well-played.gg/graphql`. May also be set with the `WELLPLAYED_ENDPOINT` environment variable.
- `organization_id` (String) Organization short id, sent as the `organization-id` header on every request. May also be set with the `WELLPLAYED_ORGANIZATION_ID` environment variable.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) Pre-obtained OIDC access token (static token flow). Mutually exclusive with `client_id`/`client_secret`. May also be set with the `WELLPLAYED_TOKEN` environment variable.
- `token_url` (String) OAuth2 token endpoint for the application flow. Defaults to `https://oauth.warrior.well-played.gg/oauth2/token`. May also be set with the `WELLPLAYED_TOKEN_URL` environment variable.
